title: SprintPlus
description: A lightweight mod that makes sprinting the default when moving forward.
body:
📘 SprintPlus

SprintPlus is a lightweight, client-side quality-of-life mod that makes sprinting the default when moving forward. When you press W, sprinting is automatically enabled using Minecraft’s normal sprint mechanics.

The mod does not increase movement speed, bypass hunger limits, or modify server behavior. It simply applies vanilla sprinting logic automatically, the same as holding the sprint key manually.

SprintPlus has no commands, toggles, or configuration files. Once installed, it works quietly in the background and follows Minecraft’s built-in sprint and hunger rules.

🔹 Features

Automatically sprint when moving forward

Respects vanilla hunger and sprint restrictions

No commands, no keybinds, no configuration

Client-side only and safe for multiplayer servers

Lightweight and minimal by design

🔹 Compatibility

Works in singleplayer and multiplayer

Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.x

Fabric loader required

🔹 What SprintPlus Is NOT

❌ Not a speed or movement hack

❌ Does not modify server logic

❌ Does not bypass anti-cheat systems

SprintPlus is designed to feel like a natural vanilla feature rather than a mod.
